MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar/fee paid. Proceedings reported by: Patricia J. VanSteenberge, CSR#1742. (212)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-29-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Mark L. Webb, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Donald Walker
Court Reporter: Freddie Reppond, Telephone # 499-DEPO

No other appearance stated. HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Donald Walker's motion to compel production of documents and additional deposition testimony is denied in part and granted in part.
2, 3, 5: denied. The requests are overbroad.

4: granted in part. Defendant is ordered to produce documents that relate to the control, operation, repair, and maintenance of the San Francisco Petroleum facility where plaintiff was injured from January1, 2005 to January 31, 2006.

All requests for monetary sanctions are denied.
Compliance by June 1, 2007 at 4:00 p.m. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Production Of Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctions

MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Donald Walker's motion to compel production of documents is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
